queue_depth.description: Total number of in-flight + queued cron runs.

errors_last_5m.description: Errors observed in the last 5 minutes (any kind, used for the status-bar dot colour).

backends.description: Per-backend probe snapshot — additive in M2.6 (`WEK-29`). Clients that don't understand the field simply ignore it; daemons that never probe leave it empty.

BackendHealth.description:
Probe state for a single registered adapter, broadcast as part of `daemon.health` so the TUI can render grey-state sidebar entries (architecture §4.3 / `WEK-29`).

The `status` enum mirrors the variants of [`crate::methods::SessionState`] in spirit but is independent: one is a *session* lifecycle, the other is a *backend* installation state. The two never collapse.

display_name.description: Human-readable label suitable for sidebar rendering.

version.description: Parsed CLI version when the last probe was `Available`; otherwise `None`. Required by `WEK-29` 验收: "日志包含 backend version".

reason.description: One-line reason suitable for UI surface — never sensitive (no stderr dumps, no command lines). For `Available` ⇒ `None`.

docs_url.description: Best-effort docs link for the failure (login page for `Unauthenticated`, install page for `NotInstalled`, upgrade page for `ProtocolDrift`).

last_probed_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent probe attempt. Empty on the first pulse before any probe has run.

BackendHealthStatus.description: Wire representation of a backend's classified probe state.

oneOf.description: Executable not on `$PATH` (or at the configured override path).
Executable exists but the user has not logged in.
Backend version returned output the adapter could not parse — usually means the CLI shipped a breaking change and the adapter needs an upgrade.
Anything else (timeout, permission denied, transport failure).
